columns.name: ORDREKILDE
columns.description: Source of the order (e.g., system or manual)

columns.name: LASTE_NAVN
columns.description: Name of the last customer associated with the order

columns.name: LASTE_ADRESSE
columns.description: Address line for the last customer or delivery location

columns.name: LOSSE_NAVN
columns.description: Name of the customer for the loss or discrepancy entry

columns.name: LOSSE_ADRESSE
columns.description: Address line for the customer in case of a loss or discrepancy

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of the last update or transaction

columns.name: HOVEDENHET
columns.description: Primary or main unit of the organization (from Cobol usage)

columns.name: NYTT_ORDRENR
columns.description: New order number or reference (from Cobol usage)
